title: gyrocheilos chorisepalus var. synsepalus
intro: Gyrocheilos chorisepalus var. synsepalus, a species of flowering plant in the family Burmanniaceae, is a type of orchid that is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
